item.title: First Steps in Django
item.description: Starting out I’ve been interested in building more web development skills for a while now. I know some basic HTML/CSS, not as much JS. In particular I wanted to learn more about back end or full stack type web development, since I’m more interested in how to translate business logic into tools than presentation or interaction in front-end focused web development. Django seemed like a good fit for me, it’s a full-stack framework in the vein of Rails or Laravel and it’s built in python.

Scientist with a coding skillset MS in Chemical Engineering. Interested in bioreactors, lab automation, and data. Moderate experience with SQL and Python. Some exerience with web dev (looking to develop more) and Azure. 🧪 Work Senior Scientist @ GSK (2021 - present) Upstream biopharmaceutical process development, specializing in technical aspects of micro-scale mammalian bioreactors (15mL, 250mL), and data projects across our department. Micro-scale bioreactor operation using Sartorius Ambr250HT 24-way bioreactor system: setup/teardown, programming, troubleshooting, training scientists.
